title: ctenitis bigarellae
intro: Ctenitis bigarellae, also known as Bigarella's fern or Japanese ctenitis, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to Japan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial properties. Ctenitis bigarellae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
